rule: hit iff (kw>=2) OR (sem>=0.7) OR (func>=0.7); total>=1 -> FAIL
candidate_llm_application: DEEL-SAFETY-STACK: 4-stage WICK/TRAP/INSULATE/BLOCK explicit functional differentiation safety pipeline with non-overlap design

independent_results.snippet: NeMo Guardrails 5 rail types: input / dialog / retrieval / execution / output rails — explicit functional differentiation by stage
independent_results.justification: Direct twin: NeMo Guardrails already provides 5 functionally-differentiated rail stages (more than candidate's 4). Explicit functional roles per stage is the core novelty claim of DEEL-SAFETY-STACK but is the defining feature of NeMo Guardrails.

independent_results.snippet: Programmable guardrails for LLM apps; input + dialog + output rails
independent_results.justification: Explicit input/dialog/output rail differentiation — same artefact as candidate's stage pipeline.

independent_results.snippet: Production stack Llama Guard + Llama Prompt Guard + NeMo orchestrating multiple guards
independent_results.justification: Multi-guard production stack with role-specific orchestration — covers role-differentiated pipeline.
Defense-in-depth multi-rail is exactly what candidate proposes; candidate explicitly cites Defense-in-Depth as prior art.
Pre-filter + post-filter multi-layer mirrors WICK + BLOCK stages.

independent_results.snippet: Multi-stage intelligent filter for safe deployment
independent_results.justification: Multi-stage filter for safe LLM deployment — same artefact.
Standard input/output filter pipeline is canonical prior art for WICK + BLOCK.

independent_results.snippet: Streaming output monitor + early-stop on harmful content
independent_results.justification: Streaming output monitor maps to BLOCK stage post-filter function.

verdict_sentence: FAIL: DEEL-SAFETY-STACK is a direct twin of NVIDIA NeMo Guardrails (which already provides 5 functionally-differentiated rail stages — input/dialog/retrieval/execution/output) and overlaps with 8 prior-art sources spanning defense-in-depth, multi-rail safety, and input/output filtering pipelines, with semantic and functional scores well above the 0.7 threshold.
